originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Snake Segfault and Finalizing Baselines for PufferLib Release
summary: Debugged a memory layout bug causing random segfaults in the Snake C environment, fixed it with a one-character change, and observed stable training. Ran hyperparameter sweeps for Pong and Breakout, finalized baselines for Connect 4, Pong, Breakout, and Snake, and progressed toward the 1.1 release.
